full_text:
Tissue was dissociated with: 9.7 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/step) + 200 µl Dispase + 100 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer, RBC lysis with 3 ml for 5 min + 15 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 6 ml of media and counted.

Cell counts:

Biobanking

6 vials of approx 6 E6 cells were frozen.

Cells were resuspended in 1 mL of STEMCELL Banker.

| | Dispase
1) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 5.51
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 1.51
 | viability [%] | 27.4
 | size [µm] | 7.6
2) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 6.84
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 7.52
 | viability [%] | 11.0
 | size [µm] | 6.8
Average | [cells/ml] | 6.175E6
 | total [cells] | 37.05E6
 | viability [%] | 19.2
